title: Proclamation No. 283, s. 1988
text:
MALACAÑANG Manila

PROCLAMATION NO. 283

AMENDING PROCLAMATION NO. 364, DATED NOVEMBER 5, 1956, WHICH REVOKED PROCLAMATION NO. 89, DATED SEPTEMBER 22, 1936, BY EXCLUDING CERTAIN PARCELS OF THE LAND EMBRACED THEREIN SITUATED IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF MALAYBALAY, PROVINCE OF BUKIDNON, AND DECLARING THE SAME AND AN ADDITIONAL AREA OF THE PUBLIC DOMAIN AS THE CINCHONA FOREST RESERVE FOR REFORESTATION AND EXPERIMENTAL PLANTATION PURPOSES.

Upon recommendation of the Secretary of Environment and Natural Resources and by virtue of the powers vested in me by law, I, CORAZON C. AQUINO, President of the Philippines, do hereby exclude certain parcels of land (548 hectares, more or less) from the operation of Proclamation No. 364, dated November 5, 1956, which revoked Proclamation No. 89, dated September 22, 1936, and declare these parcels of land as the Cinchona Forest Reserve for reforestation and cinchona-plantation purposes, together with a portion of the public domain, subject to private rights, if any there be, situated in the Municipality of Malaybalay, Province of Bukidnon, described in the Bureau of Forest Development map. F.R. – 69 (Amd.)-1, to wit:

Beginning at the point marked 1 which is N 21°36′, 978.50 meters more or less, from B.L.B.M. No. 1, Barrio Lorongan, Municipality of Malaybalay:

thence N 75°51′ W, 166.24 meters to corner 2; thence following Kiipil creek generally northwest direction about 503.71 meters to corner 3; thence S 57° W, 110 meters to corner 4; thence following road northwest direction about 80 meters to corner 5; thence S 48° W, 200 meters to corner 6; thence S 07° W, 130 meters to corner 7; thence S 59° W, 40 meters to corner 8; thence N 82° W, 40 meters to corner 9; thence S 29° W, 60 meters to corner 10; thence N 69° W, 20 meters to corner 11; thence S 28° W, 110 meters to corner 12; thence N 88° W, 100 meters to corner 13; thence N 75° W, 150 meters to corner 14; thence S 54° W, 70 meters to corner 15; thence following Pangabon creek upstream, generally northwest direction about 480 meters to corner 16; thence due west, 240 meters to corner 17; thence N 60° W, 120 meters to corner 18; thence N 68° W, 150 meters to corner 19; thence S 82° W, 180 meters to corner 20; thence following Mamao creek downstream, generally southwest direction about 540 meters to corner 21; thence S 89° W, 120 meters to corner 22; thence S 71° W, 210 meters to corner 23; thence N 60° W, 180 meters to corner 24; thence N 58° W, 270 meters to corner 25; thence S 69° W, 180 meters to corner 26; thence N 39° W, 150 meters to corner 27; thence N 15° W, 300 meters to corner 28; thence N 53° W, 240 meters to corner 29; thence S 66° W, 120 meters to corner 30; thence S 76° W, 240 meters to corner 31; thence S 53° W, 150 meters to corner 32; thence S 70° W, 160 meters to corner 33; thence S 76° W, 24 meters to corner 34; thence N 61° W, 270 meters to corner 35; thence N 02° W, 390 meters to corner 36; thence due north, 400 meters to corner 37; thence due north, 380 meters to corner 38; thence due north, 170 meters to corner 39; thence following Lomotan creek upstream generally north direction about 340 meters to corner 40; thence following the same creek upstream generally direction about 480 meters to corner 41; thence following the same creek generally of the same northeast direction about 220 meters to corner 42; thence N 45° E, 310 meters to corner 43; thence N 43° E, 320 meters to corner 44; thence N 37° E, 300 meters to corner 45; thence N 18° E, 320 meters to corner 46; thence N 52° E, 470 meters to corner 47; thence N 89° E, 350 meters to corner 48; thence N 89° E, 300 meters to corner 49; thence N 89° E, 320 meters to corner 50; thence N 89° E, 340 meters to corner 51; thence N 89° E, 360 meters to corner 52; thence N 89° E, 330 meters to corner 53; thence N 36° 56′ W, 37.68 meters to corner 54; thence N 27° 4′ E, 344.15 meters to corner 55; thence N 34° 31′ W, 366.46 meters to corner 56; thence N 07° 33′ E, 446.84 meters to corner 57; thence N 05° 41′ W, 283.50 meters to corner 58; thence following Kulasian river downstream generally southeast direction about 170 meters to corner 59; thence following the same river generally southeast direction about 180 meters to corner 60; thence following the same direction of same river about 270 meters to corner 61; thence following the same direction of same river about 450 meters to corner 62; thence following the same direction of same river about 300 meters to corner 63; thence following the same direction of same river about 550 meters to corner 64; thence following the same river generally southeast direction about 560 meters to corner 65; thence following same direction of same river about 330 meters to corner 66; thence following same river generally southeast direction about 130 meters to corner 67; thence following same direction of same river about 600 meters to corner 68; thence following same direction of same river about 580 meters to corner 69; thence following same direction of same river about 430 meters to corner 70; thence following same river generally northeast direction about 200 meters to corner 71; thence S 73° E, 320 meters to corner 72; thence S 64° E, 390 meters to corner 73; thence S 28° E, 380 meters to corner 74; thence S 40° W, 180 meters to corner 75; thence S 46° 26′ W, 279.46 meters to corner 76; thence S 33° 46′ W, 341.88 meters to corner 77; thence S 43° 38′ W, 376.38 meters to corner 78; thence S 0° 29′ E, 263.26 meters to corner 79; thence S 0° 17′ W, 108.35 meters to corner 80; thence S 36° 34′ W, 235.20 meters to corner 81; thence S 48° 23′ W, 124.72 meters to corner 82; thence S 64° 52′ W, 183.88 meters to the point of beginning, containing an area of ONE THOUSAND NINE HUNDRED SEVENTY SIX (1,976) hectares.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Republic of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done in the City of Manila, this 11th day of July in the year of Our Lord, nineteen hundred and eighty-eight.

(Sgd.) CORAZON C. AQUINO

By the President: (Sgd.) CATALINO MACARAIG, JR. Executive Secretary

Source: CDAsia
